description_long: This object consists of two thick, hardbound books stacked neatly on top of each other and secured by a wide, dark band running vertically across their covers. The covers are a deep, rich burgundy color with a subtle sheen, and the spines are rounded and slightly raised, suggesting a classic, high-quality binding. The edges of the pages are visible from the sides, appearing tightly packed and slightly off-white, indicating the books are closed and well-kept. The band is a solid, matte brown, contrasting with the glossy finish of the covers, and it appears to be made of a flexible material, possibly leather or fabric. There are no visible illustrations, text, or decorative elements on the covers or spines, giving the books a minimalist and formal appearance. The overall form is rectangular and compact, with clean lines and a sturdy, substantial look.
description: A pair of thick, burgundy hardbound books stacked and secured by a wide brown band, featuring plain covers and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The side view shows the stacked books' page edges and the clean, unadorned covers, with the band visible as a dark strip across the top.
description_view_1: The top view highlights the smooth, glossy covers and the wide brown band running vertically down the center.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the page edges and the band, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: The bottom view displays the flat, unmarked covers and the band, similar to view 1 but from the underside.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain burgundy with no visible text or decorative elements, featuring a slightly raised, rounded profile.
